76.742892 Information Type Government Higher secondary school, Co-education Established 1906 1906 Status Working Locale Palayamkunnu School district Thiruvananthapuram School code 1013 sometimes : 01013 HS SCHOOL CODE 42054 Principal Mrs.Sherly ....Headmistress Sailajadevi Number of students 2400 Grade 11 300 Education system Kerala State Education Board Classes offered Classes 1 to 12 Language English and Malayalam Hours in school day 6 hrs 09:30-16:30 Campuses GHSS, UP School Affiliations Kerala State Education Board Government Higher Secondary School, Palayamkunnu short names: GHSS Palayamkunnu HSE 1 Code: 01013 is a Higher Secondary School under The Government of Kerala following SCERT syllabus in Palayamkunnu, near Ayiroor, Varkala Thiruvananthapuram district of Kerala State, India . Courses edit Higher secondary of GHSS Palayamkunnu provides classes for Bio-Maths Batch PCMB , Maths-Computer PCMC and Commerce Batch. HSE classes are following English Medium. Secondary education is offered in both Malayalam and English media. Programmes edit The teaching methodology follows 2 Project which has remodeled conventional teaching methodologies in classrooms through the use of IT. The school follows the initiative, thus every teacher is allowed laptops and interactive software. Campus edit The campus consists of many blocks, like the HSS block, Secondary block, UP Block Government Upper Primary School , Mini-Auditorium Ramanujan Hall , Laboratory Block etc. Facilities edit The college has transportation facilities school bus , laboratory, smart class, drisyavedhi Malayalam:ദ ശ യവ ദ , stage etc. References edit .mw-parser-output .reflist-columns-2 .mw-parser-output
